name: Cocoa Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C).
2. Grease and lightly flour cookie sheets.
3. In a medium bowl, beat egg whites until frothy.
4. Add sugar, flour, cocoa, salt, and vanilla; blend well.
5. Stir in coconut.
6. Drop tablespoonfuls of batter about 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 11-16 minutes or until set. Allow to cool for 1-2 minutes before removing from the cookie sheets.
8. Yield: Approximately 2-1/2 dozen cookies.
